title: Stir-Fried Morcilla with Russian Cabbage
description: A Chinese-inspired twist on traditional morcilla, adding a crunchy Russian cabbage slaw and savory stir-fry.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add morcilla and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and scallions, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add cabbage and stir-fry until slightly wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
Prepare slaw by mixing together shredded cabbage, scallions, and a drizzle of soy sauce.
Serve stir-fry with Russian cabbage slaw on the side.
